hero.title: Unified mobile payments for the DRC
hero.subtitle: UniPay Congo connects your application to all Mobile Money networks in the Democratic Republic of Congo through a single secure integration.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete payment infrastructure to integrate mobile payments in the DRC
features.f1_desc: Connect to all Mobile Money networks through a single well-documented REST API.
features.f2_desc: End-to-end encryption and full compliance with ARPTC regulatory standards.
features.f3_desc: Monitor and manage your transactions in real time from your operator space.
features.f4_desc: Export your financial data and analyze your performance in detail.
features.f5_desc: Our team of experts is available around the clock to assist you.
features.f6_desc: SDKs available in JavaScript, PHP, Python and more to get started quickly.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.subtitle: Legal information regarding the publishing and hosting of unipaycongo.com
legal.editeur_body: This web application is published by Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l, a private limited liability company incorporated under the laws of the Democratic Republic of the Congo, registered with the Trade and Personal Property Credit Register (RCCM) under number CD/KIN/RCCM/16-B-9723, National ID 01-9-N15024X, Tax number A1621850T, with registered office at 195 Colonel Ebeya Avenue, Gombe, Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo. Phone: +243 891 023 520 — Email: contact@unipaycongo.com
legal.directeur_body: The publication director of this website is Mr. Benjamin BARRERE, in his capacity as legal representative of Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l.
legal.hebergement_body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., with registered office at 340 Pine Street, Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, United States of America.
legal.propriete_body: All content on this website (texts, graphics, logos, images, sounds and software) is the exclusive property of Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l or its partners. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or transmission, in whole or in part, of this website or its content, by any means whatsoever, without the prior written authorization of Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l, is prohibited and constitutes an infringement punishable under the laws in force in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
legal.responsabilite_body: Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l endeavours to ensure the accuracy and currency of the information published on this website, and reserves the right to correct its content at any time. However, Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision or completeness of the information made available. Consequently, Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l disclaims any liability for any inaccuracy or omission relating to information available on this website.
legal.droit_body: This website and the legal notices contained herein are governed by the laws of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Any dispute relating to the use of this website falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l collects, processes and protects your personal data
privacy.responsable_body: The data controller for personal data collected through this website is Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l, with registered office at 195 Colonel Ebeya Avenue, Gombe, Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo. For any questions regarding the protection of your data, you may contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at: contact@unipaycongo.com.
privacy.donnees_intro: In the course of operating our platform and website, we collect the following categories of data:
privacy.donnees_li1: Contact form: full name, company, email address, phone number, message
privacy.donnees_li2: B2B client data (API access): KYC information including company name, registration documents, information on legal representatives
privacy.donnees_li3: Transaction data: amounts, currencies, channels used, transaction references, timestamps and statuses
privacy.donnees_li4: Technical data: IP addresses, access logs and session information collected for security purposes
privacy.finalites_intro: The data collected is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.finalites_li1: Responding to your contact and information requests
privacy.finalites_li2: Providing and managing payment aggregation services
privacy.base_legale_intro: The processing of your data is based on the following legal grounds:
privacy.base_legale_li1: Performance of a contract: for data necessary to provide our services
privacy.base_legale_li2: Legal obligation: for compliance with ARPTC regulations and anti-money laundering requirements
privacy.base_legale_li3: Legitimate interest: for security, fraud prevention and service improvement
privacy.conservation_intro: Data is retained for the following periods:
privacy.conservation_li1: Contact form data: 3 years from the last contact
privacy.conservation_li2: Client and transaction data: 10 years in accordance with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.destinataires_intro: Your data may be shared with the following recipients:
privacy.destinataires_li1: Our technical service providers (hosting, security, cloud infrastructure)
privacy.destinataires_li2: Regulatory authorities (ARPTC, tax authorities, judicial authorities)
privacy.destinataires_li3: Our payment partners (licensed Mobile Money operators in the DRC)
privacy.destinataires_footer: We do not sell or rent any personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.droits_intro: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.droits_li1: Right of access: obtain a copy of your personal data
privacy.droits_li2: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
privacy.droits_li3: Right to erasure: request deletion, subject to legal obligations
privacy.droits_footer: To exercise these rights, send your request to: contact@unipaycongo.com
privacy.securite_body: Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against any unauthorised access, loss, destruction or alteration. Access to data is strictly limited to authorised personnel and subject to contractual confidentiality obligations.
privacy.cookies_body: This website uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the platform (language preferences, session maintenance). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are placed without your explicit consent.
privacy.dpo_body: For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you may contact our DPO at: contact@unipaycongo.com. We are committed to responding to any request within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions governing access to and use of UniPay Congo services
terms.objet_body: These Terms of Use (ToU) are intended to define the terms and conditions under which Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l (hereinafter "UniPay Congo") makes its mobile payment aggregation services available to its professional clients, as well as the respective rights and obligations of the parties.
terms.acceptation_body: Access to and use of UniPay Congo services implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms of Use. Such acceptance is deemed to have occurred upon signing the API access agreement or upon creation of a professional account. Any use of the services constitutes acceptance of these terms as currently in force.
terms.description_body1: UniPay Congo is a B2B mobile payment aggregation platform in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It enables businesses to integrate all Mobile Money networks available in the DRC (Vodacash, Orange Money, Airtel Money, M-Pesa) through a single secure REST API.
terms.description_body2: Services include: real-time transaction initiation and tracking, webhook notifications, a reporting dashboard, comprehensive technical documentation and dedicated support.
terms.acces_body: UniPay Congo services are exclusively reserved for duly registered legal entities (companies, associations, institutions). Access is subject to the completion of a KYC (Know Your Customer) verification process and the signing of a commercial agreement. UniPay Congo reserves the right to refuse access to any applicant who does not meet the applicable regulatory requirements.
terms.obligations_client_intro: The client agrees to comply with the following obligations:
terms.obligations_client_li1: Use the services in accordance with these Terms and the regulations in force in the DRC
terms.obligations_client_li2: Provide accurate, complete and up-to-date information during the KYC process
terms.obligations_client_li3: Maintain the confidentiality of access credentials and API keys
terms.obligations_client_li4: Not use the services for unlawful, fraudulent or public-order-contrary purposes
terms.obligations_client_li5: Respect the rate limits and quotas defined in the contract
terms.obligations_client_li6: Immediately notify UniPay Congo of any suspicious or unauthorised use of the account
terms.obligations_unipay_li1: Maintain platform availability in accordance with the SLAs defined in the commercial contract
terms.obligations_unipay_li2: Ensure the security and confidentiality of data transmitted through the platform
terms.obligations_unipay_li3: Provide and maintain up-to-date comprehensive technical documentation
terms.obligations_unipay_li4: Provide responsive technical support during business hours
terms.obligations_unipay_li5: Notify clients with reasonable advance notice in the event of planned interruptions
terms.tarification_body: Applicable rates are defined in the commercial agreement signed between the parties. Transaction fees are calculated according to the schedule in force at the time of the operation. Billing is carried out monthly. Any late payment will result, after a formal notice remaining without effect for 15 days, in the suspension of access to services.
terms.responsabilite_body: UniPay Congo shall not be held liable for service interruptions attributable to third-party network operators, force majeure, internet infrastructure failures, or client actions contrary to these Terms. UniPay Congo's total liability is limited to the amount paid by the client in the three months preceding the event giving rise to the damage.
terms.propriete_body: All elements of the UniPay Congo platform (API, documentation, interfaces, algorithms, trademarks, logos) are the exclusive property of Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l. The client is granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable and non-sublicensable licence, limited to the duration of the contract and solely for the purpose of using the services.
terms.confidentialite_body: Each party undertakes to keep strictly confidential all information of a confidential nature communicated by the other party within the framework of their contractual relationship. This confidentiality obligation shall survive for a period of five (5) years after the end of the contract.
terms.suspension_body: UniPay Congo reserves the right to immediately suspend or terminate access to services in the event of non-compliance with these Terms, non-payment following formal notice, or a proven risk of fraud or money laundering. The client may terminate the contract by observing the contractually defined notice period.
terms.droit_body: These Terms are governed exclusively by the laws of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Any dispute relating to their interpretation, performance or termination shall be submitted, after an attempt at amicable resolution, to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo.
terms.contact_body: For any questions regarding these Terms, you may contact us by email at contact@unipaycongo.com, by phone at +243 891 023 520, or by post at: Congo Gaming Limited S.a.r.l, 195 Colonel Ebeya Avenue, Gombe, Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo.
